name: Flex
visual_summary: A container component that displays its children horizontally or vertically, allowing developers to control the layout and alignment.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready container component with the following characteristics:

Name: Flex
Description: A container component that displays its children horizontally or vertically, allowing developers to control the layout and alignment.
Style: basic, customizable
Interactions: 
Tags: container, layout

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
